seo_title: Fitness & Group Classes | Los Cab Sports Club — Fountain Valley, CA
seo_description: Los Cab fitness center offers a multi-level gym, group classes, yoga, Pilates, Barre, HIIT, cycling, TRX and more in Fountain Valley, CA.
hero_subtitle: A full-featured gym with cardio, free weights, resistance machines, and an expansive group fitness studio for yoga, Pilates, HIIT, and more.

gym_features.title: Cardio Floor
gym_features.text: Treadmills, ellipticals, bikes, rowing machines, and stair climbers for every cardio preference.

gym_features.title: Free Weights & Resistance Machines
gym_features.text: A full range of dumbbells, barbells, cable machines, benches, and resistance equipment for strength training.

gym_features.title: Dedicated Group Fitness Studio
gym_features.text: A spacious studio for yoga, Pilates, Barre, TRX, and all group classes — with specialized flooring and mirrors.

gym_features.title: New Pilates Room
gym_features.text: A brand-new dedicated Pilates room added in Winter 2026 — featuring reformers and specialized Pilates equipment.

gym_features.title: Personal Training
gym_features.text: Relaunched personal training program with certified trainers. One-on-one sessions available for all fitness levels.

classes.name: Cardio/Core
classes.desc: High-energy cardio combined with core strengthening for a total-body workout.

classes.name: HIIT
classes.desc: High-Intensity Interval Training — short bursts of intense work followed by recovery.

classes.name: Cycling
classes.desc: Instructor-led indoor cycling classes for all levels. Great cardio workout.

classes.name: Bodyworks
classes.desc: Full-body strength and conditioning using bodyweight and light equipment.

classes.name: Yoga
classes.desc: Multiple yoga styles from restorative flow to power yoga. All levels welcome.

classes.name: Pilates Mat
classes.desc: Classical and contemporary Pilates mat work for core strength and posture.

classes.name: Barre
classes.desc: Ballet-inspired class targeting legs, glutes, and core for lean muscle development.

classes.name: TRX
classes.desc: Suspension training using your bodyweight for full-body functional fitness.

classes.name: Balance
classes.desc: Focus on core stability, proprioception, and balance for all fitness levels.

classes.name: Fitdanz
classes.desc: High-energy dance fitness class with Latin, pop, and world music rhythms. Fun for all!

classes.name: Line Dancing
classes.desc: Classic and contemporary line dancing — a fun social activity that's also great exercise.

director_bio: Our Fitness Director Peggy Pocher oversees all group fitness programming, personal training, and gym operations. With years of experience in sports club management, she ensures every member gets the most from their fitness journey.
